title: Five Principles of Healthy Eating - Meir Stampfer
text:
one of the big problems in dietary
advice is people are always looking for
the one thing the magic bullet and I
think the dietary community had gone
down the wrong path precisely because of
that problem and all of dietary advice
say 20 years ago came down to one mantra
fat is bad this was really bad advice
but it was simple and the sad truth is
that diet and lifestyle are not
complicated but they're not totally
simple and you can't pick out one thing
but you could pick out five things whole
grains eliminating processed meat
reducing red meat more plant products
nuts olive oil and physical activity
it's not super complicated but you can't
get to one thing
